title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Melting Crucible Kit Pan Glass Vials Testing Stone 8pc
description:
Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 8pc Gold Rush Kit! This set comes with some basic gold prospecting items that you'll need to sift, locate, contain and test your minerals. In the kit we've included a 10" diameter green gold pan - the deep green color will help you identify gold and other specimens from dirt, sand and sediment. Inside the gold pan, you'll find 2 dropper pipettes with a capacity of 3mL - the perfect size for absorbing gold, liquid or other particles that you're working with. Additionally we've included a metal testing stone that you can use to determine the metal you've located. ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Melting Crucible Kit Pan Glass Vials Testing Stone 8pc

Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 8pc Gold Rush Kit!

Key Features

  • 8pc Gold Rush Kit - Green 10" Pan
  • (3) 2 Dram Glass Vials for Collecting Minerals
  • 2" Testing Stone for Testing Metal
  • 3mL Capacity Dropper Pipettes
  • 2" x 2" Graphite Crucible

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-PGPS9PC2
  • UPC: 060886076506
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 10 in

This set comes with some basic gold prospecting items that you'll need to sift, locate, contain and test your minerals. In the kit we've included a 10" diameter green gold pan - the deep green color will help you identify gold and other specimens from dirt, sand and sediment.

Inside the gold pan, you'll find 2 dropper pipettes with a capacity of 3mL - the perfect size for absorbing gold, liquid or other particles that you're working with. Additionally we've included a metal testing stone that you can use to determine the metal you've located.

Lastly we've added in (3) 2 dram gold collection vials to store your small findings and keep them contained. This is a great gold prospecting set for beginners as well as fanatics!
